chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6258 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh case 1. For order on Misc. No.27829/2024 (Urgency). 2. For order on office objection Nos.1, 19 & 30. 3. For order on Misc. No.27830/2024 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.12.2024 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. The grievances of the petitioner as raised in the memo of petition are of such nature that they do not call for the interference of this Court. At best he may lodge his complaint before the appropriate forum for the redressal of his grievances. Petition as such is not maintainable and is dismissed in limine alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
